visa_types.name: Tourist Visa (TR)
visa_types.documents_required:
- For Iraqi Passport holder:

Step 1
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- One (1) color photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of National ID and valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from your intended arrival into the Kingdom) together in 1 A4-sized paper.
Step 2 After approval
- Original Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from your intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- 3 Completed application form with renewed proposed date of arrival.
- Three (3) color photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation bookings for the entire stay in Thailand.
- For Jordan Passport holders:
- Original Passport
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- Two (2) colour photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from the intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- Copy of National ID. If the applicant does not have a national ID, a driver’s license or house registration can be used.
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation booking for the entire stay in Thailand.
- For Palestine nationals with residence in the Gaza strip and the West Bank:
- Original Passport
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- Two (2) colour photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from the intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- Copy of National ID. If the applicant does not have a national ID, a driver’s license or house registration can be used.
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation booking for the entire stay in Thailand.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time is totally dependant upon the Royal Thailand Embassy,Amman  .
Applicants are encouraged to provide all the necessary documents to avoid delay in processing times.

Thailand Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5XLcYeh2NmJlWAzbtOzQOt/df47b6c8a13250f772cce4c0b4a2ef8e/thailand-touriest-visa.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist Visa (TR) may be granted to applicants for touristic purpose in Thailand.
Types of Tourist Visa and Validity:
Single-Entry Tourist Visa: valid for entering Thailand once within 3 months from the date of visa issuance. The period of stay is 60 days maximum.
Multiple-Entry Tourist Visa: valid for entering Thailand multiple times within 6 months from the date of visa issuance. It allows the holder to stay in Thailand for up to 60 days per entry.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist Visa (TR) may be granted to applicants for touristic purpose in Thailand.
Types of Tourist Visa and Validity:
Single-Entry Tourist Visa: valid for entering Thailand once within 3 months from the date of visa issuance. The period of stay is 60 days maximum.
Multiple-Entry Tourist Visa: valid for entering Thailand multiple times within 6 months from the date of visa issuance. It allows the holder to stay in Thailand for up to 60 days per entry.

## Visa Fees & Service
- Applying from Iraq
- Single Entry: 85 USD
Visa Fees = 45 USD
Service fees = 40 USD ( Including courier +bank transfer fees +service fees)
- Multiple Entry: 255 USD
Visa fees=215 USD
Service fees=40 USD ( Including courier +bank transfer fees +service fees
- Applying from Jordan
- Single Entry: 45 JD
Visa Fees = 30 JD
Service fees = 15 JD
- Multiple Entry: 165 JD
Visa fees =150 JD
Service fees=15 JD
- Applying from Palestine
- Single Entry: 115 USD
Visa Fees = 45 USD
Service fees = 70 USD (Including courier +bank transfer fees +service fees)
- Multiple Entry: 285 USD
Visa fees=215 USD
Service fees=70 USD (Including courier +bank transfer fees +service fees

## Documents Required
- For Iraqi Passport holder:

Step 1
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- One (1) color photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of National ID and valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from your intended arrival into the Kingdom) together in 1 A4-sized paper.
Step 2 After approval
- Original Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from your intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- 3 Completed application form with renewed proposed date of arrival.
- Three (3) color photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation bookings for the entire stay in Thailand.
- For Jordan Passport holders:
- Original Passport
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- Two (2) colour photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from the intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- Copy of National ID. If the applicant does not have a national ID, a driver’s license or house registration can be used.
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation booking for the entire stay in Thailand.
- For Palestine nationals with residence in the Gaza strip and the West Bank:
- Original Passport
- Completed application form (please complete all parts as clearly as possible).
- Two (2) colour photos of applicant (size 3.5 x 4.5 cm.)
- Copy of valid Passport (must be valid for at least 6 months from the intended arrival into the Kingdom).
- Copy of National ID. If the applicant does not have a national ID, a driver’s license or house registration can be used.
- Copy of an Airline ticket or confirmation slip with applicant's name, flight number as well as date of entry and departure.
- Copy of an accommodation booking for the entire stay in Thailand.

## Required Photo Specifications
Three recent (not older than 6 months) 3.5 x 4.5 cm colour photographs taken against a white background

## Processing Time
Processing time is totally dependant upon the Royal Thailand Embassy,Amman  .
Applicants are encouraged to provide all the necessary documents to avoid delay in processing times.

## Download Forms
Thailand Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5XLcYeh2NmJlWAzbtOzQOt/df47b6c8a13250f772cce4c0b4a2ef8e/thailand-touriest-visa.pdf)
To download the latest application form click here (https://amman.thaiembassy.org/en/page/type-of-visas-and-how-to-apply?menu=5f93e95070d28d494838cba2)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Non-immigrant Visas are for applicants who wish to visit Thailand for purposes such as Business,Teaching ,Studying /Academic training, Attending seminars, visiting  family members.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Non-immigrant Visas are for applicants who wish to visit Thailand for purposes such as Business,Teaching ,Studying /Academic training, Attending seminars, visiting  family members.

## Visa Fees & Service
- Applying from Iraq
- Visa Fees = 90 USD
- Service fees = 40 USD ( Including courier + bank transfer fees + service fees)
- Applying from Jordan
- Visa Fees = 60 JD
- Service fees = 15 JD
- Applying from Palestine
- Visa Fees = 90 USD
- Service fees = 70 USD ( Including courier + bank transfer fees + service fees)

## Documents Required
For the latest documents required , refer to the website 
                                                                       click here (https://amman.thaiembassy.org/en/page/type-of-visas-and-how-to-apply?menu=5f93e95070d28d494838cba2&p=1)

## Required Photo Specifications
Three recent (not older than 6 months) 3.5 x 4.5 cm colour photographs taken against a white background

## Processing Time
Processing time is totally dependant upon the Royal Thailand Embassy,Amman  .
Applicants are encouraged to provide all the necessary documents to avoid delay in processing times.

## Download Forms
Non-Immigrant Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2QHxTDtfqbGCBiilo6IhT3/107629399ad5234bafbcaf277b9c291b/Non-Immigrant-Visa-Application-Form.pdf)
To download the latest application form click here (https://amman.thaiembassy.org/en/page/type-of-visas-and-how-to-apply?menu=5f93e95070d28d494838cba2&p=1)
